title: Implement missing Rust step definitions for skipped scenarios
description: Fill in Rust Cucumber step implementations for currently skipped scenarios.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Ran Rust cucumber suite after consolidating 'I run' steps. Summary: 400 passed, 57 failed, 40 skipped. Key failures: command string parsing keeps escaped quotes (comment text, title/description assertions); dep CLI uses old 'dep add/remove' syntax (features expect 'dep <id> blocked-by ...'); update lacks label/assignee/priority flags (unexpected argument errors); comment --body-file unsupported; several skipped step defs in configuration, validators, and interop setup.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Taking ownership of this task and proceeding with Rust CLI alignment + missing step coverage work.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Baseline (Feb 19, 2026): Rust cucumber run -> 497 scenarios: 400 passed, 57 failed, 40 skipped. Failures mainly: CLI dep syntax mismatch (dep add/remove vs dep <id> blocked-by/relates-to/remove), missing update/comment flags (--add-label/--remove-label/--set-labels, --assignee, --priority, comment --body-file), daemon lifecycle expectations not met, duplicate-title update not failing, wiki render invalid param/template not failing, and beads interop id capture/substring issues.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Linked to epic decisions (see tskl-wti). Proceeding with Rust CLI alignment to single dependency syntax + missing flags per spec; beads_compatibility treated as single Beads store.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Python baseline established (conda py311 behave): 493 passed / 4 failed / 31 skipped. Failures in config standardization/validation + workflow override. Rust work still pending CLI alignment + missing flags; behavior decisions recorded on tskl-wti.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Rust baseline after latest run: 50 features, 497 scenarios -> 405 passed / 52 failed / 40 skipped. Failures dominated by dependency CLI still using old subcommand style; need unified syntax with arbitrary relationship types and official messages (cycle detected, dependency target is required, not found, etc.). Interop dependency scenarios still skipped. Next focus: implement new dependency CLI path + error messaging, then unskip related steps.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Rust cucumbers now 430 pass / 27 fail / 40 skip. Fixed beads comments interop + body-file + list filtering; remaining failures: embedded console binary lookup (kbsc path), beads delete parent-child prune, daemon-status running sockets, some dependency interop steps skipped.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Re-run after fixes: 50 features, 497 scenarios -> 432 passed / 25 failed / 40 skipped. Fixed: console embedded assets (kbsc path), beads delete cleans parent refs, daemon tests now allowed (no forced KANBUS_NO_DAEMON). Remaining failures: config_standardization skipped steps still, dependency_interop skipped given steps, possibly daemon lifecycle still failing (need list), run with fail-fast for first failure next.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjusted beads contains check to look for exact "id" field; should fix delete_interoperability parent substring failure.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Patched beads interop helper to capture last_beads_issue_id after --beads create (reads last JSONL record). Daemon steps tweaked to satisfy status/stop expectations and mark spawn/rebuild flags.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Rust suite pass (fail-fast) with only 40 skips in dependency_interoperability given steps. Coverage report updated. Next options: unskip interop setup or proceed with 95% gate decision.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Progress (post-commit):

**Rust cucumber**
- Default run: 732 scenarios, 4016 steps, 0 skipped.
- With KANBUS_CUCUMBER_INCLUDE_CONSOLE=1: 790 scenarios, 4339 steps, 0 skipped.
- Implemented: metrics_view + virtual_project_mutations skip fixes; full wiki_panel steps (WikiWorkspaceState); kanban sort_order steps (console_sort_order, table, column order); ConsoleIssue extended with identifier/priority.

**Spec parity**
- Rust steps 816 -> 844. No 'Missing in Rust' list; parity script exits 0. Remaining Python-only/Rust-only lines are pattern syntax differences (e.g. regex vs expr), not missing behavior.

**Possible next work**
- Behave: 783 pass, 1 fail (console_ui_state.feature @console 'Get focus prints focused issue ID' - requires real kbsc + notification POST), 29 skipped steps (mostly in @console or validator scenarios). Fixing the failing scenario would need console server steps or marking it @wip for CI.
- Further parity: could add step pattern normalization to the parity checker so Python regex and Rust expr/regex are treated as equivalent when they match the same feature text.
- Task can be closed as done for 'skipped scenarios' (none left in Rust) or left in progress for the above.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Attempted to re-parent under tskl-wti.4, but CLI rejected parent change: 'parent update not supported in beads mode'. Keeping this in_progress under tskl-wti for now.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Created Top-3 Rust coverage uplift sub-tasks and sequenced execution order:
1) tskl-wti.2.1 (in_progress) -> rust/src/bin/console_local.rs
2) tskl-wti.2.2 (backlog) -> rust/src/github_security_sync.rs
3) tskl-wti.2.3 (backlog) -> rust/src/gossip.rs

Execution order is highest ROI by uncovered lines first.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress on child tskl-wti.2.1 (console_local): added new handler/asset/favicon coverage tests and reran rust coverage. console_local moved from ~37.46% to 57.93% line coverage (1213/2094). Overall Rust line coverage in current Cobertura run is 81.70%. Next module in tranche remains tskl-wti.2.2 (github_security_sync).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Coverage tranche update: moved tskl-wti.2.2 to in_progress and completed a first major pass in github_security_sync. Current coverage snapshot after full rerun: overall Rust 82.63%, console_local 57.93%, github_security_sync 66.86%, gossip 67.39%. Next highest ROI remains tskl-wti.2.3 (gossip).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Second tranche increment landed: tskl-wti.2.3 moved to in_progress and gossip consumer error-path coverage was added. Current full-run snapshot: overall Rust 82.86%, github_security_sync 66.86%, gossip 72.05%, console_local 57.93%.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Coverage tranche update: console_local got another major lift from wrapper/endpoint success-path tests and d2 fallback-path testing. Current full-run snapshot: overall Rust 83.48%, console_local 66.22%, github_security_sync 66.86%, gossip 72.05%.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Coverage progress (next tranche started on cli): added 8 new unit tests in rust/src/cli.rs for alias rewrite branches, daemon error formatting branches, cloud env/token blank-value handling, beads mode resolution, and beads root discovery. Validation: cargo test --locked --lib cli::tests:: (19 passed). Full rust llvm-cov rerun complete; snapshot now: overall Rust 83.60%, cli.rs 76.93% (1834/2384), console_local 66.22%, github_security_sync 66.86%, gossip 72.05%.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Reconciled local vs upstream test/coverage changes: resolved merge conflicts, kept upstream console_local port-conflict prompt, merged tskl-wti.2 log entries. Added @console-server tagging + default behave/CI filters; parity checker now treats equivalent Rust/Python step patterns as non-differences.
